HESP649 Clinical Practice in Audiology (1-3 Credits)

Supervised training in the application of clinical methods in the diagnosis and treatment of hearing disorders.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

HESP649A Clinical Practice in Audiology: Diagnostic Procedures (1-3 Credits)

Supervised training in the application of clinical methods in the diagnosis of hearing disorders.
